title: PowerShell Command Basics
description: Learn essential Windows PowerShell cmdlets for process, service, file management, and getting help.

tasks.explanation: 'Get-Service' retrieves the service status (running, stopped) for all services registered on the computer.
'Get-Process' lists all active processes running on the local Windows machine.

tasks.prompt: Create a new file named 'log.txt' in the current working directory.
tasks.explanation: 'New-Item' is the PowerShell cmdlet to create files or folders. Specifying -ItemType 'File' creates a blank text document.

tasks.prompt: Copy folder 'src' to destination 'backup' recursively (including subdirectories).
tasks.explanation: Copy-Item copies items. The -Recurse switch ensures all child items and folders are duplicated.

tasks.prompt: Retrieve help documentation for the 'Get-Process' cmdlet.
tasks.explanation: 'Get-Help' prints syntax, parameter info, and description for any registered PowerShell command.
